<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$BOSS$ = Damage * Boss Multiplier
$BDPS$ = Boss Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$BCE$ = Total Price / Boss DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-SCHEMA$ = N; N; N; N; A; A; A; A; B; B; B; B;
$FNC-BRANCH$ = Top Path Stats; Bottom Path Stats
$FNC-COST$ = 10000; 8000; 19500; 41000; 55000; 72000; 95000; 150000; 85000; 120000; 180000; 500320;
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ; ; ; ; 5; ; 7; -1;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Combat Tactics; 32nd Spec-Ops; Re-routed Funds; Fortifier; Defensive Maneuvers; Flak Jacket; Hammerhead; Experimental Weaponry; Bigger Guns; Titanium Armor; Thresher;
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 123365136014760; 93721065871366; 96118655853436; 111732653007157; 95544278655808; 98941243657730; 106308635701035; 110879981278605; 88574561737643; 126158680785346; 106308635701035;
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS does not consider rev-up time.</ref>
$RC$ = $FNC-RECURSION$
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="8" |Neutral Stats
|-
!Level !!Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}}$RC$ || 14 || 0.2 || 2 || 16 || $DPS$ || $RC${{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || $RC$ || 22 || 0.17 || 2 || 16 || $DPS$ || $RC$
|-
| 2 || $RC$ || 48 || 0.17 || 1.8 || 19 || $DPS$ || $RC$
|-
| 3 || $RC$ || 100 || 0.17 || 1.8 || 21 || $DPS$ || $RC$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="10" |Top Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! Fortify Radius !! Fortify Debuff Time Reduction !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 185 || 0.2 || 1.2 || 21 || 6 || 15% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 230 || 0.17 || 1.2 || 24 || 7.5 || 15% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 315 || 0.17 || 1 || 24 || 7.5 || 30% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 7 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 425 || 0.17 || 1 || 24 || 11 || 50% || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |Bottom Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Boss Multiplier !! Boss Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Boss DPS !! Cost Efficiency !! Boss Cost Efficiency
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 100 || 1.25 || $BOSS$ || 0.1 || 1.8 || 21 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 175 || 1.25 || {{#expr:$BOSS$ round 0}} || 0.1 || 1.8 || 24 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 260 || 1.5 || $BOSS$ || 0.1 || 1.8 || 26 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|-
| 7 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 400 || 1.5 || $BOSS$ || 0.1 || 1.6 || 30 || $DPS$ || $BDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$BCE$}}
|}
</div>
